name: Dijonnaise Glazed Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 Thin Rib or Loin Pork Chops (About 1 Lb)
1/2 Cup Hellmann's Dijonnaise Creamy Mustard Blend
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat corn oil over medium-high heat. Add pork chops; cook until lightly browned on both sides and thoroughly cooked. Remove chops from the skillet and drain fat.
2. In a small bowl, combine creamy mustard blend, apricot preserves, sliced green onions, and soy sauce. Pour into the skillet. Cook over low heat, stirring until slightly thickened.
3. Return pork chops to the skillet, turning to coat. Heat through.
